title: Applications/Systems Programmer
description:
Title : Systems Programmer

Main responsibilities

 You will mainly be responsible for:

  • Providing primary operational technical support and assist the functional support teams
  • Improving complex operations (DRP, Migrations, Major maintenance etc.)
  • Improving reliability and quality of our systems (automation, monitoring, alerting, security, RCA etc.)
  • Reducing time-to-market by implementing CICD pipelines where possible
  • Managing technical issues, escalations and ensuring good level of delivery
  • Maintain, improve and standardize existing workflow processes and framework
  • Promoting knowledge sharing within the organization (trainings, documentations etc.)
  • Bridging the gap between Dev and Ops
  • Maintain programmable code outlined in technical instructions and specifications for operating systems.

Qualifications and Profile

At least a Bachelor’s degree in any of these faculties:

  • Computer Science
  • Information Technology
  • Programming & Systems Analysis
  • Science (Computer Studies)

Functional

  • Experience in a banking environment in a plus.

Technical

  • Minimum 3 years of experience with UNIX environments (Must have)
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in scripting languages such as Python, Powershell
  • Minimum 2 years of hands on experience in any of these tools and technologies such as Ansible, Gitlab, Azure Devops, Docker, Kubernetes  (Must Have) 
  • Experience with task schedulers such as Control-M (Must Have) 
  • Good understanding of IT ecosystems and application architectures
  • Knowledge about

-          CICD pipelines, ITIL practices, Agile practices, Lean

-          Observability tools such as Grafana, Kibana, Prometheus, AppDynamics or Dynatrace is a plus

Other Professional Skills and Mindset

  • Good analytical and problem solving skills
  • Proactive and able to propose new ideas
  • Positive attitude towards continuous learning and improvement
  • Team player
  • Curious about new technologies

We are looking for Applications/Systems Programmer to join our Application Services department to help usimplement DevOps. This a very hands-on technical role to drive continuousimprovement initiatives on top of day-to-day BAU support. We want someone withfresh and relevant ideas who is passionate about learning new things and wantsto develop themselves further.

 As we are covering the bank’s global operations, you will work in rotational shifts** and also be occasionally doing on-call support*** during non-business hours. This will be an opportunity to have abetter perspective of what can be further improved in production!

 On call support: This covers 7 consecutive days during non-business hours to manage escalated incidents and to work on planned changes, weekend included.

Rotational shifts: Members in the team will rotate accordingly around 3 shifts (time will shift to an hour later during the daylight saving time period in the year).

  • Morning: 7am-4pm
  • Afternoon: 2pm-11pm
  • Evening: 5pm-2am


EA License No: 11C4879 / Registration ID : R1218583

Apar Technologies Pte Ltd, Singapore

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, we are one of Asia Pacific’s leading organizations, providing technology consulting, software development and outsourcing services, with operations in 5 countries across the region and with development centres in Singapore, Malaysia and India.

Apar Technologies is a part of the Apar Group, a billion dollar industrial conglomerate and managed by Basil Partners, a successful technology venture fund.

Apar combines a passion for client satisfaction, deep industry and technology expertise and a global workforce working in an honest and ethical work environment to deliver value.

Our four growth platforms—Technology consulting, Business intelligence, Collaboration and Cloud and big data—are the innovation engines through which we build world-class skills and capabilities and create, acquire and manage key assets central to the development of world class services and solutions for our clients.

Apar aims to be the preferred business partner of global companies, helping them create best – in- class technology and business solutions.
